We were established in 1998, and today we provide our service in 20+ cities and 25+ years of trusted experience in hearing care. Our expert audiologists provides a range of services, including hearing tests, speech therapy, hearing aid devices, and fitting. We specialize in advanced hearing aid technology and personalized treatment related to your hearing loss. We are committed to providing expert solutions to our patients ensuring the highest patient satisfaction and cutting-edge solutions. We provide top-brand hearing aid devices and individual care for our patients. Our Vision We aim to lead in speech, language, hearing, and balance solutions, providing top-notch customer service and innovative care. Our goal is to offer a supportive, inclusive environment that helps everyone achieve their communication goals. Our Mission At Meenakshi Speech and Hearing Clinic, we are dedicated to delivering comprehensive and customer-focused solutions for speech, language, hearing, and balance challenges. We want to empower our clients to communicate confidently and enhance their quality of life. Authorised Service Partners of Leading Hearing Aid Brands. Why Choose Us Why Chose Meenakshi Speech and Hearing Clinics Expertise and Experience With over 25+ years of service in the field, Meenakshi Speech and Hearing Aid Clinics bring a wealth of experience and knowledge to the table, ensuring high-quality care and effective solutions for your hearing and speech needs. Highly Qualified Professionals Our team comprises highly qualified audiologists and speech therapists who are dedicated to providing personalized care. They bring their expertise and compassion to every client interaction. State-of-the-Art Technology Our clinics are equipped with the latest diagnostic tools and advanced hearing aids, ensuring precise diagnosis and effective treatment plans. We continually update our technology to provide the best possible care. Proven Track Record Having served over 200,000 satisfied clients, our reputation speaks for itself. We are proud of the positive outcomes and improvements in quality of life that our clients experience. Comprehensive Services From hearing tests and cochlear implants to speech therapy for all ages, our wide range of services are designed to meet all your audiology and speech pathology requirements under one roof. Convenient Locations With over 20 clinics spread across North India, accessing our exceptional services is easy and convenient. We are commited to being easily accessible in multiple locations and ready to help whenever you need us. FAQs Affordable Pricing that Doesn't Sacrifice Quality What services do you offer? We provide a range of services including hearing assessments, speech therapy, cochlear implants, and hearing aid fittings. How do I know if I need a hearing aid? If you're experiencing difficulty hearing conversations, especially in noisy environments, or find yourself asking people to repeat themselves often, it might be time to schedule a hearing test. Are your clinicians certified? Yes, all our audiologists and speech therapists are certified and have extensive training in their fields. What types of hearing aids do you offer? We offer a variety of hearing aids including behind-the-ear, in-the-ear, and completely-in-canal models from leading manufacturers. Can children receive services at your clinic? Absolutely, we offer speech and hearing services for clients of all ages, including children. How long does a typical speech therapy session last? Each session typically lasts about 45 to 60 minutes, depending on the specific needs of the client. What is the process for getting a cochlear implant? The process involves a comprehensive evaluation to determine candidacy, followed by the surgical procedure and subsequent rehabilitation sessions. Do you offer custom treatment plans? Yes, we customize treatment plans based on individual assessments to meet the unique needs of each client. How can I make an appointment? You can make an appointment by calling our clinic directly or booking through our website. Do you accept insurance? Yes, we accept most major insurance plans. Please contact us with your insurance details so we can confirm coverage. Call Us +91-95558-12345 Email Us meenakshiclinic@gmail.com 3 Steps To Better Life Easy Steps To Get Our Services 01. Book an Appointment We are available in 20+ Cities in India. Call now to book your free appointment. 02. Get a Free Consultation in Clinic Our expert audiologist will diagnose your hearing and give you a trial of the recommended hearing aids. 03. Better Hearing Once you are 100% satisfied, buy your hearing aids and experience the best hearing and after sales services. So first you Read More » Testimonials What Our Patients Say Maniram Sharma IAS I am Mani Ram Sharma from a remote and backword area of Rajasthan in Alwar District. Now my age is 35 of years old. I become totally deaf when I was nearly 7-8 of years old. Actually my mother is deaf. So it is a hereditary problem in my family. My son, now 11 years old is also deaf. Actually there are nearly 45 members in my blood relation which are totally deaf. Vedansh (Parents) Patient He was born profoundly deaf we assume. Newborn screening wasn't mandatory at that time. Having no history of deafness in neither my nor his father's family, I dismissed the thought and didn't have tested. When Vedansh was 1.5 yrs old, I was taking his picture, kept calling Vedansh's name but he wouldn't response to sound. I finally waved my hand in front of his face and that startled him. Shashwat (Parents) Patient When Shashwat, was born in Nov2008, little did my husband and I know what challenges the future held for us. When Shashwat was 6 months old, I had already begun to suspect that he couldn't hear. Our apartment was very small, and we kept him infant seat on our dining room table right near the front door. When this heavy door would slam, he wouldn't startle. Ready to rediscover clear communication? Schedule your consultation today!
